people.text: Nina wants to learn how to cook simple vegetarian meals. She is free on Saturday mornings and prefers a class where everyone cooks instead of only watching.
Tom needs to improve his computer skills for office work. He wants a short evening course that includes emails and documents.
Grace enjoys making things and wants a relaxed art class. She would like to take something home at the end.
Ali wants to practise spoken English with other learners. He feels shy, so he needs a small, supportive group.
Beth wants to become fitter but dislikes running. She would prefer a dance class suitable for beginners.

texts.text: Green Kitchen runs on [6]Saturday mornings[/6] and teaches students to prepare [6]simple vegetarian lunches[/6]. Everyone works in pairs at cooking stations, so the class is practical rather than just a demonstration.

Office Basics is a four-week course on Tuesday evenings. Students practise [7]writing emails[/7], saving files and creating [7]clear workplace documents[/7]. It is designed for adults who need confidence with everyday computer tasks.

Clay and Colour is a calm art workshop for beginners. Participants design a small bowl, paint it and [8]take their finished piece home[/8]. The teacher gives help, but there is no pressure to be perfect.

Speak Easy meets in groups of eight. Learners practise short conversations, and the teacher makes sure [9]shy students get gentle support[/9]. The focus is on [9]speaking naturally[/9], not written grammar.
Dance Fit for Starters uses simple steps and popular music. It is [10]suitable for complete beginners[/10] and gives people a way to exercise [10]without running[/10] or using gym machines.
Family Baking is for adults and children who want to make cakes together on Sunday afternoons.
Advanced Coding teaches website design and expects students to complete online homework every week.
City Runners trains experienced athletes for local races and includes outdoor practice in all weather.

answers.explanation: Nina needs Saturday vegetarian cooking with practical work.
Tom needs evening office computer skills.
Grace wants relaxed art and something to keep.
Ali needs supportive spoken English practice.
Beth wants beginner dance fitness without running.
